web_app.name: Passive Context
web_app.goal: Collect public-web context when the target is internet-facing.

web_app.name: Fingerprinting
web_app.goal: Identify the live HTTP surface, framework, server, and defensive controls.

web_app.name: Known Vulnerability Fast Lane
web_app.goal: Immediately correlate corroborated product and version fingerprints with known-vulnerability intelligence before planner starts.

web_app.name: Surface Mapping
web_app.goal: Map routes, JavaScript-exposed endpoints, and same-origin API surface.

web_app.name: Trust And Auth
web_app.goal: Check cross-origin trust behavior and visible session/authentication clues.

api.name: Passive Context
api.goal: Collect passive DNS and archive context when the API is publicly reachable.

api.name: Transport And Headers
api.goal: Fingerprint transport behavior, headers, and visible controls.

api.name: Known Vulnerability Fast Lane
api.goal: Immediately correlate corroborated product and version fingerprints with known-vulnerability intelligence before planner starts.

api.name: API Surface
api.goal: Enumerate API routes, versions, and client-exposed endpoints.

api.name: Trust And Session
api.goal: Inspect CORS, token, and session clues on visible endpoints.

mobile.name: Artifact Profile
mobile.goal: Extract static metadata, permissions, and code-level mobile findings.

mobile.name: Storage Review
mobile.goal: Check storage-related exposure in extracted mobile artifacts when available.

infra.name: Service Inventory
infra.goal: Map live hosts, ports, and reachable services.

infra.name: Exposure Posture
infra.goal: Check for reachable database and service exposure clues on the infrastructure target.

network.name: Service Inventory
network.goal: Map the reachable network surface and service posture.

network.name: Local Discovery
network.goal: Enumerate nearby hosts and broadcast-adjacent exposure when applicable.

iot.name: Service Inventory
iot.goal: Map reachable services and IoT-relevant network behavior.

iot.name: Firmware Context
iot.goal: Analyze firmware artifacts when a firmware image is provided.

linux_server.name: Service Inventory
linux_server.goal: Map open services, routes, and transport exposure.

linux_server.name: Exposure Posture
linux_server.goal: Check for reachable database and service exposure clues on the Linux server target.

desktop.name: Binary Profile
desktop.goal: Inspect the desktop binary and embedded dependencies when an artifact is available.

cloud.name: Storage Exposure
cloud.goal: Enumerate public cloud storage exposure and naming patterns.

cloud.name: Provider Posture
cloud.goal: Collect high-level provider misconfiguration signals when the provider is known.

container.name: Image Profile
container.goal: Inventory packages, vulnerabilities, and image-layer exposure from the container artifact.

container.name: Runtime Posture
container.goal: Check runtime and orchestration posture when runtime access exists.

repository.name: Secret And History
repository.goal: Find exposed secrets, deleted sensitive files, and risky history.

repository.name: Code And Pipeline
repository.goal: Review source code, dependencies, and CI/CD configuration for security issues.
